item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Have some science.
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01cKJB2HOjc https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Triboluminescence
Explosive hydroforming a steel sphere. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Explosive_forming
Parhelion visible in a valley between mountains https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sun_dog
Gradient-index optics https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gradient-index_optics https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rnNjV3fh-4M
Femur of Triceratops on left versus femur of African Elephant on right https://www.rom.on.ca/people/shino-sugimoto Fossil preparator?, Vertebrate Palaeontology Technician? at Royal Ontario Museum
Parker Solar Probe. The first one to touch the sun. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parker_Solar_Probe https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c80TzqNoqMg
Fresnel Lens, from an old giant tv. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fresnel_lens Could not find the source; only link I found claiming to be source was down/removed.
The first simulated image of a black hole, calculated with an IBM 7040 computer using 1960 punch cards and hand-plotted by French astrophysicist Jean-Pierre Luminet in 1978. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jean-Pierre_Luminet
Schlieren Optics visualizing airflow https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mLp_rSBzteI https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Schlieren_photography
Floating an iron anvil in mercury. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f5U63IGmy6Q
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: Bernoulli needed a year to learn how behave with his cat sibling Ginger
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: 11 years later…I have never been happier. Trans healthcare saves.
item.description: 11 years ago, I was ready to end it, then I took a chance. I found the Care I needed, and I was able to treat my dysphoria successfully! As of this last year, I am completely through the process, and I have never been more excited to wake up every morning. Lately I’ve been discovering my own sense of style, getting used to shopping discovering myself for the first time and really just enjoying being a woman. The woman I was always meant to be. Trans healthcare saves lives, it’s as simple as that. Never lose Hope and remember, I love you. ❤️
item.dc:creator: SlanderousLici

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Why use ai to make a meme? This took less than five minutes.
item.description: Threw this together in less than five minutes in response to a shitty AI generated meme on reddit. https://www.reddit.com/r/PoliticalMemes/comments/1l72qa8/what_invaders_look_like/ OP made a shitty post. I made it better. Images taken from https://www.nytimes.com/2019/04/03/business/economy/immigration-labor-economy.html and https://www.americanspecialops.com/photos/view.php?i=/images/photos/law-enforcement/ICE-SWAT-hr.jpg&r=/photos/law-enforcement/ice-special-response-team.php AI is completely unnecessary for making memes or image macros. I could have made this one better if I actually tried, but the point stands.
item.dc:creator: rmx256

item.title: It's definitely a non scale victory for me!
item.description: Not a beach towel, but an actual "normal" sized bath towel. I'm so fucking happy. I'm on a weight loss journey. 77ish pounds down from 285. Send inappropriate gifs, memes and your favorite playlist to work out to!

item.title: Pride Month Manga Monday: "I Was Born the Wrong Sex!" (series; ch. 01)
item.description:
Author: Konishi Mafuyu. Read right to left
Nice and informative series about the reassignment surgery process. New manga posted every Monday More LGBT+ manga https://imgur.com/gallery/CCaPPxw
item.dc:creator: keyblader1985

item.title: Absolutely
item.description: I have spent my entire adult life watching liberals run past 1000 conservative evils just so they can publicly criticize a fellow liberal for the slightest infraction. Meanwhile conservatives have damn near codified the illegality of criticizing fellow conservatives. Guess what? Mitch McConnell is both evil and unfuckable. But they only listen to the unfuckable part because that's the part that hurts them. They don't care if they are stupid or evil. They care about being unfuckable.
item.dc:creator: TheSecondPiewackit

item.title: Late Sunday dump of amazing things. Enjoy !
item.description:
Excellent use of free will..... ( girls are slower ...)
Expanded metal machine
Firefighting with drones.
An amazing spice rack
Tricycles have sure gotten advanced.
Cookie Cutters Machine (sorry for the music. I wanted to keep the machine sound).
A tree is burning inside after lightning strike
A smart way to move house in Brussels
A River Of Rocks. I didn't even knew this may exist ...
Incredible strength and balance. Some blondes are really great !
Making of Silver Varq
Perfect illusion
Perfectly cut tree.
The art of paper cutting
Using only a scalpel and glass, this artist creates stunning pet portraits.
Peeling Ivy from brick home
never prepping for paint any other OK there's an idea, but not sure it gains time or makes it easier ...
This... relaxes me. Don't put your ...
Double ninja kitchen knives.
Evolution of BMW

item.title: Fascists shoot an Australian reporter with a rubber bullet
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: What Happened Today #129
item.description: ? The collision is coming fast. Protests erupted on Sunday from Los Angeles to San Francisco while Trump threatens military force and the Insurrection Act. In six days, US Army tanks roll through Washington for his birthday parade on the exact same day as the "No Kings" rallies, while his economic wrecking ball bill picks up speed to crush working families. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/travel-ban-begins 2. https://go.govbrief.today/la-riots-intensify 3. https://go.govbrief.today/san-francisco-protests 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-military-leaders-riots 5. https://go.govbrief.today/army-terror-graffiti 6. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-allows-cpb-firings 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cyber-order 8. https://go.govbrief.today/abc-suspends-moran Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-threatens-taxes Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/pride-march-worldpride Free & Private Subscription - https://govbrief.today IMGUR Reminder: I've been blocked from chat, but I don't know if it's a deliberate Imgur action. You can find me everywhere else if you need to communicate privately. I always use my real name as my handle.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
I uploaded this like. weeks ago. got tired of posting. got pulled back onto my pc to check something... guess I feel like posting. been busy with irl stuff and focusing on discord things. so not sure how much I will post aside from when my cake day rolls around. Enjoy!
yup.
mhmm
pouting cause my favorite person to get going talking about things has been super busy. I miss their voice. (or I miss your voice if you see this. havnt decided if ima bother you with a link cause. well you know)
...
sometime soon please?
I like running my nails across arms. and skin.
I look forward to moving and closing this chapter in my life. I always want to think fuck them I hope the worst and then correct that to no. I wish them well. I hope they get the help they need so they never harm someone in the ways they deeply harmed me.
friends. followers.
I know why.
I really am trying to work on this. it hard tho when going from tons of communication to not a lot.
waiting til i move then wanna get a cute cuddly pink blanket. already have some picked out to decide from. am trying to wait. I do kinda want one now tho.
I am slacking. I need more super credits. just not been feeling gaming at all this weekend.
oh I go down a couple rabbit holes each day. good ones tho.
@ShaggyRoots
I feel like this might be a two part thing.
my void is currently sitting next to my chair. waiting to hop up on me when he sees an opening.
... trying so hard to cut back on my internet time things and do more irl things.
hmmm...
...update. my cat is now on my lap.
in meme dumps. in mah discord. we need safe spaces to breathe from all of the fucked up things going on right now.
yea got some vac bag things for figuring out how much I can actually compress my clothes to know how much I can bring with me when I move. since I was able to move here in a mini van and also have acquired some things I want to keep. got distracted in my head thinking about select things and om the awesome person who got them for me. :p
yes.
mhmm.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We will be doing DnD things in the future here shortly. Will be interesting. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "I stand before you as a tower of strength, the weight of the world on my shoulders. As you pass through my life, look, but not too close, for I fear I will expose the vulnerable me." -Deidra Sarault "We tend to think of the rational as a higher order, but it is the emotional that marks our lives. One often learns more from ten days of agony than from ten years of contentment." -Merle Shain I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #deliciousness #potato #memes #dailydirties
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Well he may have had a magnificent grasp for the obvious. Both her parents had been in the movie business long before she was ever born.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Something Different Sunday, various artworks for your pleasure.
item.description:
If you don't know, I spend what some could say is an unhealthy amount of time looking for cool werewolf artwork. But I also see and appreciate the art of other subjects of almost any kind. So today, I present something different! Today, I gotchu sum: containment breaches, the Law, neo futures, forgotten times, dragon's wishes, and wolp. I've tried the alternative x links, I can't get them to work consistently. Until I can guarantee artist credit, you may alter the link on your own accord. https://colehart.carrd.co/
https://alariko.carrd.co/
https://linktr.ee/azure_meraki
https://www.patreon.com/hat_legs/about
Rogue Protocol
Judge Dredd
https://x.com/mirri_muncher/status/1930572134444827132?t=-CrCTbcLW1oEWr-nyCcHFg&s=19
https://x.com/sqildo/status/1930456342092829090?t=xiafkVasa_rOfkmh96-LYg&s=19
https://linktr.ee/kyander
https://www.patreon.com/plive/about
https://saltamor.carrd.co/
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/61084532/
https://bsky.app/profile/sintoj.bsky.social/post/3lqfho7c6o22r
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/61115324/
https://x.com/RoawayArt/status/1930686054442356774?t=-5eQfl5F30qC-SpH028obA&s=19
https://www.artstation.com/artwork/RKDqqr
Teefs. https://kaijjuuu.wixsite.com/my-site
https://www.artstation.com/artwork/o0zOk
https://bsky.app/profile/tomatolover16.bsky.social/post/3lqrmpgqpj22o
Oh good! You are my favorite humans!
There's a full moon pretty soon, so expect some more werewolves then!
https://saterina.carrd.co/
https://bsky.app/profile/booniebaby6.bsky.social/post/3lqxcopquo22w
https://linktr.ee/sinealas
https://linktr.ee/Slapknutts
Have an amazing night! https://hipolink.net/ravenmadwolf
